data.title: RED: Add eval test for sprint testing_mode routing
data.description:
## Description

Add eval test cases to sprint's promptfooconfig.yaml asserting correct routing by testing_mode.

### Steps
1. Run existing sprint evals to confirm GREEN baseline
2. Add eval test case: task with testing_mode=GREEN → sprint skips RED test dispatch, proceeds to implementation
3. Add eval test case: task with testing_mode=UPDATE → sprint routes to modify-existing-test behavior
4. Add eval test case: task without testing_mode field → sprint defaults to current RED behavior (backward compat)
5. Add .test-index RED marker

### File Impact
- `plugins/dso/skills/sprint/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml` — Edit
- `.test-index` — Edit (add RED marker)

## Testing Mode
RED

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Eval baseline GREEN confirmed
  Verify: .claude/scripts/dso run-skill-evals.sh plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] Eval tests assert testing_mode routing
  Verify: grep -q "testing_mode" plugins/dso/skills/sprint/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- [ ] RED marker in .test-index
  Verify: grep -q "\[sprint_testing_mode" .test-index
